seoTitle: 3 Day Montreal Class Trip Itinerary - Landmark Educational Tours
seoDescription: Task your student group on 3 Day Montreal Class Trip Itinerary to discover this incredible eclectic and culturally diverse city.
html:
3 Day Montreal Class Trip Itinerary: History, Culture, and French Fun Awaits

Welcome to our ultimate 3 Day Montreal Class Trip Itinerary! It’s an action-packed journey, immersing your students in the vibrant culture and history of Montreal, the heart of French Canada. From exploring the cobblestone streets of Old Montreal to indulging in delicious local cuisine and engaging in educational experiences, every moment of this itinerary is designed to provide an unforgettable adventure. So, grab your backpacks and get ready for an exciting exploration of this enchanting city!

First Day

  • Bonjour, Montréal! Arrive in the heart of French Canada and settle into your hotel.
  • Step Back in Time: Explore Old Montreal’s cobblestone streets on a walking tour, culminating in Place Jacques Cartier, a lively gathering spot.
  • Dinner with History: Dine amidst the ancient charm of Restaurant du Vieux Port, a true Montreal landmark.
  • Metro Magic: Hop on the Montreal Metro for a quick ride back to the hotel.

Second Day

  • Breakfast with a Twist: Fuel up at Eggspectation, a trendy cafe known for its delicious and creative breakfast options.
  • Notre Dame’s Majesty: Be awestruck by the stunning Notre Dame Basilica, a Montreal jewel.
  • French for Fun: Engage in a lively French language class, learning about the unique culture of Quebec and beyond.
  • Underground Adventure: Dive into the vast Montreal Underground City, a network of shops and passageways beneath the streets. Practice your French with friendly locals!
  • City Sights: Embark on a city tour, spotting iconic landmarks and soaking in Montreal’s vibrant atmosphere.
  • Voyageur Secrets: Uncover the fascinating history of fur trading at the Lachine Fur Trade Interpretation Centre.
  • Sugar Shack Experience: Enjoy a traditional sugar shack experience – a hayride, delicious all-you-can-eat maple syrup dinner, folk music, dancing, and of course, a sugar-on-snow party!

Third Day

  • Breakfast at the Hotel: Start your day with a delicious breakfast spread.
  • Hockey Heaven: Visit the iconic Bell Centre, home of the Montreal Canadiens – a must for any hockey fan.
  • Science or History? You Choose: Explore the wonders of science at the Montreal Science Centre or delve into Montreal’s rich past at the Pointe-à-Callière Museum.
  • Farewell, Montreal!: Depart with unforgettable memories and a newfound appreciation for French-Canadian culture.

This itinerary is packed with exciting activities, delicious food, and historical exploration. Your students immerse themselves in the French language and culture, learn about Montreal’s vibrant past, and create memories that will last a lifetime!
